macro.title: Warner Bros Shareholders Approve Paramount Merger, Vote Against Zaslav Pay Package - Variety
macro.summary: Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders approved the merger with Paramount Skydance but symbolically voted against payout packages for CEO David Zaslav and other WBD top brass.

macro.title: Stocks fall, S&P 500 and Nasdaq pull back from all-time highs: Live updates - CNBC
macro.summary: Stocks declined Thursday, giving back some of the gains that took the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite to fresh record highs in the previous session.

macro.title: ServiceNow Stock Falls On Q1 Results, Outlook. Analyst Day Set For May 4. - Investor's Business Daily
macro.summary: Enterprise software maker ServiceNow reported Q1 earnings that met estimates while revenue edged by views. ServiceNow stock fell on the news.
